name: stories260K
license_evidence: karpathy/tinyllamas HF cardData.license=mit + tag license:mit. Karpathy's llama2.c project is MIT-licensed on GitHub.
arch: llama2.c native: dim=64 layers=5 heads=8 kv=4 vocab=512 tied output head
quant: int4 group-wise (g=64), tie-aware (output head shares tok_embeddings)
runtime: karpathy llama2.c run.c + tok512.bin (512-vocab, 6KB) -> dequant to .bin export
notes: all_finite=true, max dequant err ~0.106 (acceptable for babble-tier). 130KB on tape (tiny 6KB tok512 vs 64KB SentencePiece). Leaderboard est 150KB int4 / 1.07MB FP32 -> we beat the int4 est.
